title: Sliding Doors
description: Sliding doors to decorate your buildings
body:
![sliding doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48fca6e912c81e75d0eaedba81f8851f534b9ca1.png)

Give a unique touch to your Minecraft constructions with Sliding Doors! This incredible mod offers you the possibility of adding wooden sliding doors to your buildings, with a selection of 20 different models in 11 different types of wood so you can customize every detail.
Whether you are building a cozy cabin in the woods or a stately home, these doors will not only add functionality, but also a touch of style and elegance. Decorate with style and open new design possibilities with Sliding Doors.

![doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfee5fd73d8f52b3aa1c75af6109d525edf2756.png)

8 new doors added 24/02/25

![DOORS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e0346d7ebf8d0412e98d5c9b6c81bdcc3923a5.jpeg)

Crafting

stripped log and iron block

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05f013f47895888610ce5159247f762c49a1062a.png)
